OPENCTI_URL.description: The URL of the OpenCTI platform.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: Comma-separated list of supported MIME types.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Enable or disable automatic import of files matching the scope.

CONNECTOR_ONLY_CONTEXTUAL.description: If true, only extract data when an entity context is provided.

CONNECTOR_VALIDATE_BEFORE_IMPORT.description: If enabled, bundles are sent for validation before import.

IMPORT_DOCUMENT_CREATE_INDICATOR.description: If true, creates an Indicator for each extracted observable.
